title: Budget Allocation Algorithm
description: Algorithm for allocating IT budget based on priority and capacity needs
code:
PROCEDURE AllocateBudget(totalBudget, capacityRequests)
BEGIN
 SORT capacityRequests BY priority DESC
 SORT capacityRequests BY urgency DESC
 allocatedBudget = 0
 remainingBudget = totalBudget
 
 FOR each request IN capacityRequests
 BEGIN
 IF remainingBudget >= request.cost THEN
 request.approved = TRUE
 allocatedBudget = allocatedBudget + request.cost
 remainingBudget = remainingBudget - request.cost
 ELSE
 request.approved = FALSE
 request.deferredToNextYear = TRUE
 ENDIF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN allocationReport
END
explanation: This algorithm prioritizes requests by urgency and priority, allocating budget sequentially until depleted. Requests not funded are marked for potential carryover.

complexity.time: O(n log n) due to sorting

title: Budget Variance Calculator
description: Calculate and categorize budget variance for IT capacity planning review
code:
PROCEDURE CalculateVariance(plannedBudget, actualSpend)
BEGIN
 variance = actualSpend - plannedBudget
 variancePercent = (variance / plannedBudget) * 100
 
 IF variancePercent > 10 THEN
 category = "SIGNIFICANT_OVERRUN"
 ELSIF variancePercent > 0 THEN
 category = "SLIGHT_OVERRUN"
 ELSIF variancePercent < -10 THEN
 category = "SIGNIFICANT_UNDERSPEND"
 ELSIF variancePercent < 0 THEN
 category = "SLIGHT_UNDERSPEND"
 ELSE
 category = "ON_TARGET"
 ENDIF
 
 RETURN {variance, variancePercent, category}
END
explanation: Calculates budget variance and categorizes it to help identify patterns that may indicate planning issues or the effects of Use It or Lose It pressure.

title: Carryover Fund Manager
description: Manage funds that can be carried over to next fiscal year
code:
PROCEDURE ManageCarryover(unspentBudget, plannedProjects)
BEGIN
 carryoverAmount = 0
 maxCarryoverPercent = 0.20
 
 IF unspentBudget > 0 THEN
 carryoverAmount = unspentBudget * maxCarryoverPercent
 
 FOR each project IN plannedProjects
 BEGIN
 IF project.approved AND project.nextYear THEN
 project.allocation = carryoverAmount
 carryoverAmount = carryoverAmount - project.allocation
 ENDIF
 END FOR
 ENDIF
 
 RETURN allocatedCarryover
END
explanation: Manages carryover funds within policy limits, allocating them to approved projects planned for the next fiscal year.

title: Capacity-Based Budget Estimator
description: Estimate budget needed based on capacity requirements
code:
PROCEDURE EstimateBudget(capacityNeeds, historicalCosts)
BEGIN
 baseBudget = 0
 
 FOR each need IN capacityNeeds
 BEGIN
 costPerUnit = historicalCosts[need.type]
 estimatedCost = need.units * costPerUnit
 growthFactor = 1 + (need.growthRate / 100)
 estimatedCost = estimatedCost * growthFactor
 baseBudget = baseBudget + estimatedCost
 END FOR
 
 contingency = baseBudget * 0.10
 totalBudget = baseBudget + contingency
 
 RETURN totalBudget
END
explanation: Estimates required budget based on capacity needs, historical costs, projected growth, and a contingency buffer.

title: IT Budget Tracker Class
description: Python class to track and analyze IT budget utilization
explanation: Python class that tracks IT budget, calculates utilization, determines variance, and predicts year-end spending patterns to identify Use It or Lose It issues.

complexity.time: O(1) for basic operations, O(n) for project iteration
